items.title: Man City vs Brighton – FA Cup final: Get £50 in football free bets when you join Betfred
items.summary: BRIGHTON will look to spring a huge upset when they take on three-time winners Manchester City in the Women's FA Cup final at Wembley today. And brand new Betfred customers can claim a sensational £50 in free bets and bonuses when they sign-up and stake a tenner on the massive encounter. Find The Su
